assertions.text: Two sections: corrected text and numbered change log
Every correction corresponds to an actual change

assertion_results.note: Corrected text section followed by numbered change log with original, corrected, and reason
All change log entries correspond to actual corrections in the text: goverment, iniative, buisnesses, role/roll, assisstance, whos/whose, demostrate, there/their, atleast, compliment/complement
British English conventions applied; Oxford comma and number rules from house style followed
Their/Theyre, wendsday/Wednesday, all ready/already, its/its all correctly logged
Both sections present with comprehensive change log
All corrections logged: Europian, artifical, substancial, proccess, wich, Parliment, aproach, goverance, enforcment, desicions, requirments, conformaty, transparancy
British English with -ise endings applied; institution names capitalised per house style
